2300130.name: We Are Things
2300130.description:
We Are Things is a tense 2 player co-op horror game. Hide from a bizarre creature on a spaceship that transforms you into objects. Help your friend retake their human form – or transform them into tools that unlock the way out. Explore the ship, find secrets, and survive together! 

The monster can teleport!

If it catches you, you will end up somewhere else and become someTHING else. Use stealth and hiding spots strategically to avoid losing your human form. 

You become things

If you get transformed into an object, guide your still-human partner to your location by describing your surroundings and observing their silhouettes through walls. 

Escape or lose your humanity

Team up to avoid the monster as you explore an abandoned space ship full of secrets in search of the parts needed for the teleporter that will let you escape this nightmare. However the parts have been transformed into random objects! Work together to locate and restore the teleporter parts.

Features

  • Intense 2 player co-op that is heavy on communication. 

  • A monster looking for you at every corner. 

  • A difficulty that scales up the longer you play. 

  • Players transform into objects of all kinds, some of which could be potentially useful to progression. 

  • An assortment of tools to help you seek the objects you need. 

  • Objectives that change dynamically with each attempt to keep each playthrough fresh. 

  • Rich environmental storytelling filled with secrets to uncover.
